scripts.storage:link: php -r "$target='storage\\imgs';$link='public\\imgs';if(is_dir($link)||is_link($link)){echo 'Removendo link existente...'.PHP_EOL;if(PHP_OS_FAMILY==='Windows'){exec('rmdir '.escapeshellarg($link));}else{unlink($link);}}echo 'Criando link simbolico...'.PHP_EOL;if(PHP_OS_FAMILY==='Windows'){exec('mklink /J '.escapeshellarg($link).' '.escapeshellarg($target));}else{symlink($target,$link);}echo 'Link criado: public/imgs -> storage/imgs'.PHP_EOL;"
scripts.migrate:fresh: php vendor/bin/phinx rollback -e development -t 0 && php vendor/bin/phinx migrate -e development && php db/seeders/run_seeds.php
scripts.deploy: npm run prod && copy /Y resources\index.html public\index.html && npm run migrate:fresh && npm run storage:link
